subject: fix(spacing): resolve 5 spacing issues across both pages
body:
1. Hero top padding (index.html): Reduced from 3rem to 2rem total gap
   between nav and hero h1. Previous 2rem hero padding + 1rem Pico main
   padding was excessive, especially on mobile.

2. Section separation (index.html): Increased section margin-bottom from
   1rem to 2.5rem. Pico's default 1rem created weaker inter-section gaps
   than the 1.5rem intra-section subtitle gap, inverting visual hierarchy.

3. Vertical rhythm (project.html): Unified hero, meta-grid, and doc-tabs
   bottom margins to 1.5rem. Previous values (1rem, 2rem, 1.5rem) created
   inconsistent spacing between content blocks at the same hierarchy level.

4. Footer double spacing (both pages): Added last-child margin reset.
   Pico's body > footer padding-block (1rem) combined with p margin-bottom
   (1rem) doubled the bottom space.

5. Back link (project.html): Added .back-link class with smaller font size
   to visually de-emphasize navigation and differentiate from hero content.

Tags: ui, spacing, css, layout
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
